overview:
MFMailComposeViewController  insertCollaborationItemProvider(_:completionHandler:) Instance MethodinsertCollaborationItemProvider(_:completionHandler:)iOS 18.4+iPadOS 18.4+Mac Catalyst 18.4+visionOS 2.4+func insertCollaborationItemProvider(
    _ itemProvider: NSItemProvider,
    completionHandler: @escaping (Bool) -> Void
)func insertCollaborationItemProvider(_ itemProvider: NSItemProvider) async -> Bool Parameters itemProviderSpecifying the intended content for collaboration

Returns YES if the item provider was added to the composition successfully.

If the return value is YES, the itemProvider was added to the composition.  The itemProvider must be non-nil.
